## Before opening this pull request

This repository is currently published in read-first mode.

- Public contributions are not being accepted yet.
- This pull request may be closed without review.
- The public communication entry point will be opened later in `between-docs`.

If this pull request is for a typo or factual correction that cannot wait, please keep the change minimal and clearly explain the reason.

For security matters, do not use pull requests.
Please follow `SECURITY.md`.

Thank you for your understanding.
